56016.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1491 : Mark Wahlberg / Mark Hamill / Musical Guest
56016.description: The long-running late-night talk show returns to New York for the first time since 1972 when comic Jimmy Fallon takes over hosting duties, accompanied by his Grammy-winning house band, The Roots. The former cast member of "Saturday Night Live" and lead of a later show welcomes guests to an evening of comedy, music, conversation and competitions. Lorne Michaels serves as the programme's executive producer.

56054.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1491 : Mark Wahlberg / Mark Hamill / Musical Guest
56054.description: Jimmy Fallon hosts A-list guests along with a topical monologue, fan-favourite games, signature comedy segments, and popular music from Grammy-winning house band, The Roots.
